medical_history.history_of_present_illness: First sat at 9 months and walked without support at 18 months. Walking was initially difficult with many falls. Expressive language was delayed. Hyperopia and multiple serous otitis. Neuropsychological assessment at 7 years using the Wechsler Intelligence Scale for Children (WISC) revealed low scores in total intellectual quotient (between 50 and 63).
medical_history.family_history: One healthy older brother. Mother suffered from endometriosis, causing two previous miscarriages.

physical_examination.general_examination: Normal growth in height, weight and head circumference. Able to write her name and to recognize alphabet letters. Mild joint laxity. No dysmorphic features nor motor deficiency.
